ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Continued To Mar-28-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being continued from Nov-15-2022 for further prove-up hearing for entry of judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:47:27 a.m., pausing at 09:53:09 a.m., reconvening at 09:54:30 a.m., pausing at 10:30:06 a.m., reconvening at 10:38:02 a.m., and concluding at 10:40:38 a.m.

Plaintiff Maria Flamenco appearing represented by Veronica Chavez, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference. Plaintiff is assisted by a Spanish Language Interpreter, Patrice Binaisa; Certification No. 301593.
Defendant Township Building Services, Inc. not appearing.

MARIA FLAMENCO is placed under oath on behalf of Plaintiff.

Supplemental Declaration of Maria Flamenco in Support of Default Judgment Against Defendants Jorge Rodas and Noe Franco filed Dec-14-2022.
Court has reviewed declaration to determine Plaintiff's damages.

Court examines MARIA FLAMENCO.
The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A (Attached to Supplemental Declaration) - Chart of Unpaid Wages

The matter is submitted.
Default has been entered against Defendants Jorge Rodas and Noe Franco.
Defendant Township Building Services were previously DISMISSED.

Court finds Plantiff has proven all elements to support its complaint.
Based on the documents filed, the statements made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Maria Flamenco, and against Defendants Jorge Rodas and Noe Franco, as follows:

1. Economic Damages (Past Wages from 5/5/2016 to 12/20/2022): $52,287.82
2. General Damages: $104,575.64
3. Costs: $1,391.47
4. Attorney Fees: $24,475.71

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $182,730.64

Plaintiff is awarded interest on Economic Damages at 10%.
Court to determine interest.

Counsel for Plaintiff shall prepare and submit proposed judgment.
Counsel shall distinguish economic damages, general damages, attorney fees, costs, and the division between the two Defendants. The amount of interest shall remain blank.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2022 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Prove-Up Hearing For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Continued To Dec-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for prove-up hearing for entry of judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:44:10 a.m., pausing at 10:06:55 a.m., reconvening at 10:13:59 a.m., and concluding at 10:29:40 a.m.

Plaintiff Maria Flamenco appearing represented by Veronica Chavez, Esq., is placed under oath, and testifies via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Township Building Services, Inc. not appearing.

Court determines Proof of Service of Statement of Damages was filed Feb-23-2022.
Plaintiff seeks Special Damages in the sum of $400,000.00, General Damages in the sum of $1,000,000.00, Interest in the sum of $400,000.00, Costs in the sum of $1,391.47, and Attorney Fees in the sum of $24,475.71.

Plaintiff's counsel presents summary of case, basis of petition, and an offer of proof.
MARIA FLAMENCO is examined by the Court.

Court cannot determine calculations of damages sought by Plaintiff.
Court further examines Plaintiff and its Counsel.

Counsel for Plaintiff shall file a supplemental declaration to aid the Court in calculating damages. Declaration must include Plaintiff's wage, how much Plaintiff made at variuos subsequent jobs and copies of paystubs, as a base amount for damages by Dec-14-2022. An electronic courtesy copy shall be sent to Department 514 via e-mail.

Court orders matter continued to Dec-20-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 for submission of declarationd and further hearing on prove-up hearing for entry of judgment.
